task_completion.description: Open the Strategy Analyzer in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window titled 'Strategy Analyzer' is open within the NinjaTrader 8 application.
In the Strategy Analyzer settings pane (usually on the right), the 'Strategy' dropdown is set to 'SampleMACrossover'.

task_completion.description: Configure the instrument basket for SPY, AAPL, and MSFT
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the settings pane, the 'Instrument' or 'Instrument list' field shows a selection containing SPY, AAPL, and MSFT (e.g., a custom instrument list or multiple selected instruments).

task_completion.description: Set the timeframe to Daily and date range to 1/1/2024 - 12/31/2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the settings pane, 'Type' is set to 'Day' (or Daily), 'Value' is 1, 'Start date' is set to 1/1/2024, and 'End date' is set to 12/31/2024.

task_completion.description: Run the backtest and display results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main area of the Strategy Analyzer displays populated backtest results (e.g., Summary report, equity curve, or trade list) indicating the backtest has successfully executed.

task_completion.description: Save the workspace to persist the configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center is open with a 'Save' action being clicked, or a 'Save Workspace' dialog is visible.

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure the backtest
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the NinjaTrader 8 graphical interface (dropdowns, text fields, buttons) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Backtest results appear genuine and derived from the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer results show realistic trading metrics, charts, or tables formatted by NinjaTrader, not manually typed text or mockups.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The application shown is NinjaTrader 8, identifiable by its Control Center and Strategy Analyzer UI, not a text editor or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The strategy to look for is 'SampleMACrossover', which is a built-in NinjaTrader strategy. The instruments are SPY, AAPL, and MSFT. The date range must be configured as 1/1/2024 to 12/31/2024, though the actual first trading day in the historical data is 1/2/2024 (due to the New Year's holiday). The bar type is Daily. The data used is real Yahoo Finance historical data, so the backtest results should reflect realistic market movements for these specific tickers in 2024.
